title: bumelia cubensis subsp. ekmaniana
intro: Bumelia cubensis subsp. ekmaniana, also known as the Cuban Bumelia, is a plant species native to the Caribbean region, belonging to the family Sapotaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Bumelia cubensis subsp. ekmaniana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections. Herbal preparations of this plant are made by infusing its leaves in water or using it as a decoction, and it is often used in folk medicine to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions.
